profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.avatarHint: Recommended size 256×256px. PNG, JPG or GIF.
profilePage.workspaceAccessDesc: Manage your membership of this workspace.
profilePage.removeYourselfDesc: You will lose access to all teams and issues in this workspace.
profilePage.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove yourself from this workspace? This cannot be undone.
profilePage.leaveWorkspaceDesc: Only available when you belong to more than one workspace.
